findings: Multiple backward bulk-related features exhibit extremely low cardinality and near-constant values, indicating minimal variability within this cluster.
Forward bulk-related features similarly show extremely low cardinality and near-constant values, mirroring backward bulk feature behavior.
Dataset-level duplication verification confirms presence of duplicated rows, which may impact feature distributions and dependencies.
Partition-level observations indicate moderate class imbalance, potentially influencing structural patterns and feature distributions.
